prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含理科/物理类）最低位次约1999→2229→1653→1780→2462，整体呈波动上升趋势，2025年较2024年后移约682名，为近5年最高位次（最易进 ），2025年基准约2462名；本省理科组计划2021–2025年分别为54、54、57、54、53人，2025年53人；2026年计划53人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化， 对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2023年第20名、2024年第21名、2025年第23名、2026年回升至第21名，稳居 全国顶尖高校行列，对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及生科院院长论文数据造假被免职、多位教师被实名举报等学术不端事件，抖 音热度排名第36（较热），但负面舆情可能使部分谨慎型考生转向其他院校，对报考热度产生一定抑制作用；拥有14个A-及以上学科，其中化学、工商管理、应 用经济学、数学为A+，世界史、中国史、中国语言文学、物理学、统计学等9个学科为A，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年广西物理类考生约 258,720人（按历史比例估算），较2025年260,429人略降约0.66%，考生规模微降对竞争压力略有缓解；南开大学位于天 津市，非本省高校，无本地倾斜优势；广西考生对北方名校的跨省报考意愿相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、声誉负面舆情可能抑制 部分报考热情、考生规模微降等因素，预计2026年竞争略弱于2025年，位次在2025年基准2462名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约2492名，区间2208–2776名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Science Group (including Science/Physics Category) was approximately 1999→2229→1653→1780→2462, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 682 places compared to 2024, marking the highest ranking (easiest to enter) in the past five years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2462. The provincial Science Group enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 54, 54, 57, 54, and 53 respectively, with 53 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 53, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities was 20th in 2021–2023, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025, and rebounded to 21st in 2026, firmly among the top universities nationwide, maintaining strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly involving the dean of the School of Life Sciences being dismissed due to data fabrication in a paper, and multiple teachers being reported for academic misconduct. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), but negative public opinion may cause some cautious candidates to turn to other institutions, somewhat suppressing application enthusiasm. The university has 14 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Chemistry, Business Administration, Applied Economics, and Mathematics, and A in World History, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Physics, Statistics, and 9 other disciplines, with strong academic strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangxi is approximately 258,720 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight decrease of about 0.66% from 260,429 in 2025. The slight decrease in candidate scale slightly eases competitive pressure. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in the province, so there is no local preference advantage. Guangxi candidates' willingness to apply to prestigious northern universities across provinces remains relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of ranking shift in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the negative reputation that may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the slight decrease in candidate scale, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly weaker than in 2025, with the ranking shifting slightly back from the 2025 baseline of 2462. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2492, with a range of 2208–2776.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2208–2776, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2200), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as the Boling Class and Mathematics and Big Data. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 2700), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group (including liberal arts/history category) was approximately 270 → 370 → 304 → 266 → 412, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2025, the ranking moved back by about 146 places compared to 2024, marking the highest ranking (easiest to enter) in the past five years, with a baseline of about 412 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 26, 27, 34, 32, and 34 students respectively, with 34 students in 2025. The 2026 plan is 28 students, a reduction of 6 students (-17.6%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction in enrollment and notably intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, with a stable ranking in the top 21 on the Soft Science Ranking, possessing top-tier comprehensive strength and sustained appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative; academic misconduct incidents may cause some students to hesitate, but Nankai University's brand effect as a traditional prestigious school remains strong, and the impact of negative public opinion on the liberal arts group is relatively limited. The university has abundant A- and above disciplines related to liberal arts: Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Theoretical Economics A, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, Political Science A, and Marxist Theory A, with liberal arts strength ranking among the top nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Guangxi is approximately 133,280 (estimated based on historical proportion), an increase of about 11.9% compared to 119,153 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in the examinee pool and intensified competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in the province, but as a top-tier comprehensive university nationwide, its cross-provincial application popularity remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of ranking moving back in 2025, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-17.6%), the dual competition intensification factors of an approximately 11.9% increase in examinee scale, and the limited inhibitory effect of negative reputation public opinion, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be notably more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 358, with a range of 308–408.
